title: Doc2ArchAgent Dataflows Schema
description: Schema for app-dataflows.yaml and human-dataflows.yaml — traffic flow definitions within patterns. Network-level flows use source_zone/target_zone. Component-level flows use source_component/target_component. Both can coexist.

dataflow_metadata.description: Metadata describing the audience and purpose of these dataflows.

pattern_ref.description: Pattern ID this dataflow file belongs to.

audience.description: Who these flows serve. application=system-to-system, human=user-facing, hybrid=both.

source_zone.description: Source zone ID (for network-level flows). References a zone in networks.yaml.

target_zone.description: Target zone ID (for network-level flows). References a zone in networks.yaml.

source_component.description: Source component ID (for component-level flows). References a component in system.yaml.

target_component.description: Target component ID (for component-level flows). References a component in system.yaml.

target_listener_ref.description: Listener ID on target component. Enables STRIDE-per-element analysis.

protocol.description: Communication protocol (HTTPS, TCP, MQ, SSH, gRPC, etc.).

tls_required.description: Whether TLS encryption is required for this flow.

data_classification.description: Highest data classification carried by this flow.

authz_model.description: Authorization model enforced on this flow.

direction.description: Traffic direction relative to the target.

admin_interface.description: Whether this is an administrative/management flow. Requires stronger auth (MFA per PCI-DSS Req 8.3).

session_timeout_minutes.description: Session/token timeout in minutes. Relevant for human-facing flows.

data_entities.description: Data entity IDs carried by this flow.
